Field.name: AggroGroup
Field.Description: Used to group entities together so they become aggressive at the same trigger and sometimes used with aggro boundaries.

Field.name: AppearanceEventID
Field.Description: Used in ESD. 1 through to 7 are used to determine NG+ appearance.

Field.name: LocationEventID1
Field.Description: An event ID used by ESD or hardcoded logic. Used for location based events, often for an NPC to move from one place to another.

Field.name: LocationEventID2
Field.Description: An event ID used by ESD or hardcoded logic. Used for location based events, often for an NPC to move from one place to another.

Field.name: LocationEventID3
Field.Description: An event ID used by ESD or hardcoded logic. Used for location based events, often for an NPC to move from one place to another.

Field.name: LocationEventID4
Field.Description: An event ID used by ESD or hardcoded logic. Used for location based events, often for an NPC to move from one place to another.

Field.name: LocationEventID5
Field.Description: An event ID used by ESD or hardcoded logic. Used for location based events, often for an NPC to move from one place to another.

Field.name: MapObjectBonfireID
Field.Description: The ID of the bonfire this entity is linked to. Used with ascetics, effigies, and multi-player.

Field.name: LocationEventID6
Field.Description: An event ID used by ESD or hardcoded logic. Used for location based events, often for an NPC to move from one place to another.

Field.name: LocationEventID7
Field.Description: An event ID used by ESD or hardcoded logic. Used for location based events, often for an NPC to move from one place to another.

Field.name: AIThinkID
Field.Description: The AI for this entity. A boss AI will need to be damaged, changed, or ESD wizardry if you move it elsewhere.

Field.name: HostileEventID1
Field.Description: Flag to be set when the entity becomes hostile towards the player character.

Field.name: HostileEventID2
Field.Description: Flag to be set when the entity becomes hostile towards the player character.

Field.name: LocationEventID8
Field.Description: An event ID used by ESD or hardcoded logic. Used for location based events, often for an NPC to move from one place to another.

Field.name: LocationEventID9
Field.Description: An event ID used by ESD or hardcoded logic. Used for location based events, often for an NPC to move from one place to another.

Field.name: ModelMask
Field.Description: Determines which model masks to use. Also decides which model mask set to use in color params.

Field.name: ItemLotID1
Field.Description: Typically the itemlot entry that acts as a drop table for this entity.

Field.name: GraveEventID
Field.Description: Flag to be set when the entity is dead and requires a gravestone for the player character to interact with.
